requirement_topic.en: EMC Requirements — TIS/IEC 60034 Reference and TISI Scope
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 要求 — TIS/IEC 60034 参考与 TISI 适用范围
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 要求 — TIS/IEC 60034 參考與 TISI 適用範圍

summary.en: Thailand does not operate an EU-style mandatory standalone EMC directive for industrial motors. EMC requirements for motors in Thailand are addressed primarily through IEC 60034 series provisions referenced in or harmonised with TIS standards. Industrial AC motors operating on EGAT or MEA grids must comply with applicable grid-side interference requirements. NRCT (National Research Council of Thailand) has jurisdiction over radio-frequency emissions where applicable, but industrial motors typically fall outside the primary radio-equipment scope. Purchasers and system integrators connecting motors to EGAT or MEA grids should confirm EMC compatibility with the relevant grid operator requirements.
summary.zh: 泰国没有欧盟式的针对工业电动机的独立强制 EMC 指令。泰国电动机的 EMC 要求主要通过 TIS 标准中引用或协调的 IEC 60034 系列条款处理。在 EGAT 或 MEA 电网上运行的工业交流电动机须符合适用的电网侧干扰要求。泰国国家研究委员会（NRCT）在适用情况下对无线电频率发射拥有管辖权，但工业电动机通常不属于无线电设备主要适用范围。将电动机接入 EGAT 或 MEA 电网的采购方和系统集成商应向相关电网运营商确认 EMC 兼容性要求。
summary.zht: 泰國沒有歐盟式的針對工業電動機的獨立強制 EMC 指令。泰國電動機的 EMC 要求主要透過 TIS 標準中引用或協調的 IEC 60034 系列條款處理。在 EGAT 或 MEA 電網上運行的工業交流電動機須符合適用的電網側干擾要求。泰國國家研究委員會（NRCT）在適用情況下對無線電頻率發射擁有管轄權，但工業電動機通常不屬於無線電設備主要適用範圍。將電動機接入 EGAT 或 MEA 電網的採購方和系統集成商應向相關電網運營商確認 EMC 兼容性要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60034 series (motor EMC provisions, referenced by TIS)
EGAT / MEA grid connection requirements (EMC/interference aspects)

summary.en: China addresses EMC for industrial motors through GB/T 25442 (EMC requirements and test methods for rotating electrical machines) and GB 4343 series (for equipment generating electromagnetic disturbances). CCC scope for motors primarily addresses safety; EMC testing may be required separately depending on the motor's drive electronics or control integration. Chinese export documentation typically includes EMC test reports under IEC or GB standards.
summary.zh: 中国通过 GB/T 25442（旋转电机电磁兼容要求及测试方法）和 GB 4343 系列（产生电磁干扰的设备）处理工业电动机的 EMC 问题。电动机的 CCC 范围主要涉及安全性；根据电动机的驱动电子设备或控制集成情况，可能需要单独进行 EMC 测试。中国出口文件通常包含依据 IEC 或 GB 标准出具的 EMC 测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國透過 GB/T 25442（旋轉電機電磁兼容要求及測試方法）和 GB 4343 系列（產生電磁干擾的設備）處理工業電動機的 EMC 問題。電動機的 CCC 範圍主要涉及安全性；根據電動機的驅動電子設備或控制集成情況，可能需要單獨進行 EMC 測試。中國出口文件通常包含依據 IEC 或 GB 標準出具的 EMC 測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 25442 (EMC requirements for rotating electrical machines)
GB 4343 series (electromagnetic disturbance limits for equipment)

gap.en: Thailand does not impose a standalone mandatory EMC certification analogous to the EU's CE EMC Directive for industrial motors, reducing the certification burden compared to EU export. However, motors connected to EGAT or MEA grids may need to demonstrate electromagnetic compatibility under the respective grid operator's technical requirements. Exporters should verify EMC requirements with the Thai importer and end-customer, particularly for variable-speed-drive applications that generate additional harmonic emissions.
gap.zh: 泰国对工业电动机没有类似欧盟 CE EMC 指令的独立强制 EMC 认证要求，与欧盟出口相比降低了认证负担。但接入 EGAT 或 MEA 电网的电动机可能需要按相应电网运营商的技术要求证明电磁兼容性。出口商应与泰国进口商和终端客户确认 EMC 要求，尤其是对产生额外谐波发射的变速驱动应用。
gap.zht: 泰國對工業電動機沒有類似歐盟 CE EMC 指令的獨立強制 EMC 認證要求，與歐盟出口相比降低了認證負擔。但接入 EGAT 或 MEA 電網的電動機可能需要按相應電網運營商的技術要求證明電磁兼容性。出口商應與泰國進口商和終端客戶確認 EMC 要求，尤其是對產生額外諧波發射的變速驅動應用。

mandatory_status.target: No standalone mandatory EMC certification for industrial motors in Thailand as of last verified date; grid operator technical requirements may apply
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 25442 is a recommended standard; GB 4343 series may be mandatory depending on motor category and drive electronics

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Thailand does not require a standalone EMC certificate for industrial motors equivalent to the EU CE EMC marking. Motors with IEC 60034-compliant EMC characteristics and Chinese GB/T 25442 test reports are broadly acceptable for TIS 2783 certification purposes, but exporters should confirm EMC requirements with the Thai buyer and grid operator for specific installation contexts. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 泰国对工业电动机不要求与欧盟 CE EMC 标志等效的独立 EMC 证书。具有 IEC 60034 合规 EMC 特性及中国 GB/T 25442 测试报告的电动机，在 TIS 2783 认证方面总体上可接受，但出口商应就具体安装情境与泰国买家和电网运营商确认 EMC 要求。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 泰國對工業電動機不要求與歐盟 CE EMC 標誌等效的獨立 EMC 證書。具有 IEC 60034 合規 EMC 特性及中國 GB/T 25442 測試報告的電動機，在 TIS 2783 認證方面總體上可接受，但出口商應就具體安裝情境與泰國買家和電網運營商確認 EMC 要求。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: NRCT Radio Frequency Emissions — Applicability to Motors
requirement_topic.zh: NRCT 无线电频率发射 — 对电动机的适用性
requirement_topic.zht: NRCT 無線電頻率發射 — 對電動機的適用性

summary.en: The National Research Council of Thailand (NRCT) regulates radio frequency emissions under Thailand's Telecommunications Act and related NBTC (National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission) regulations. For standard industrial AC motors without integral radio transmitters or wireless communication modules, NRCT/NBTC radio type approval is generally not required. However, if a motor is supplied with integrated variable-frequency drives (VFDs) or wireless control modules, radio type approval via NBTC may be required for the communication component. Exporters should confirm the scope of any radio module included in the motor package.
summary.zh: 泰国国家研究委员会（NRCT）依据泰国《电信法》及相关 NBTC（国家广播和电信委员会）法规对无线电频率发射进行监管。对于不带无线电发射器或无线通信模块的标准工业交流电动机，通常不需要 NRCT/NBTC 无线电型号批准。但是，如果电动机随附有集成变频器（VFD）或无线控制模块，则通信组件可能需要通过 NBTC 进行无线电型号批准。出口商应确认电动机包中所含无线模块的适用范围。
summary.zht: 泰國國家研究委員會（NRCT）依據泰國《電信法》及相關 NBTC（國家廣播和電信委員會）法規對無線電頻率發射進行監管。對於不帶無線電發射器或無線通訊模組的標準工業交流電動機，通常不需要 NRCT/NBTC 無線電型號批准。但是，如果電動機隨附有整合變頻器（VFD）或無線控制模組，則通訊組件可能需要透過 NBTC 進行無線電型號批准。出口商應確認電動機包中所含無線模組的適用範圍。

standards_or_laws: NBTC (National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission) radio type approval

summary.en: China's SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval is required for radio transmission modules before sale in China. Motors with integrated wireless modules for IoT or remote monitoring would require SRRC approval in China and NBTC approval in Thailand. Standard three-phase induction motors without wireless components are outside the SRRC and NBTC radio-approval scope in both jurisdictions.
summary.zh: 在中国销售的无线传输模块须在销售前取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准。配备用于物联网或远程监控的集成无线模块的电动机，在中国须取得 SRRC 核准，在泰国须取得 NBTC 批准。不带无线组件的标准三相感应电动机在两个司法管辖区均不在 SRRC 和 NBTC 无线电批准范围内。
summary.zht: 在中國銷售的無線傳輸模組須在銷售前取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准。配備用於物聯網或遠端監控的整合無線模組的電動機，在中國須取得 SRRC 核准，在泰國須取得 NBTC 批准。不帶無線組件的標準三相感應電動機在兩個司法管轄區均不在 SRRC 和 NBTC 無線電批准範圍內。

standards_or_laws: SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval (for radio modules)

gap.en: For standard three-phase induction motors without wireless modules, no NBTC radio approval gap exists. For motors supplied with integrated VFDs with wireless connectivity or IoT features, both SRRC (China) and NBTC (Thailand) approvals are needed; Chinese SRRC approval does not substitute for Thai NBTC approval. Exporters should clearly separate the motor certification (TISI TIS 2783) from any wireless-component approval pathway.
gap.zh: 对于不带无线模块的标准三相感应电动机，不存在 NBTC 无线电批准差距。对于配备无线连接或物联网功能集成变频器的电动机，须同时取得 SRRC（中国）和 NBTC（泰国）批准；中国 SRRC 批准不能替代泰国 NBTC 批准。出口商应明确区分电动机认证（TISI TIS 2783）和任何无线组件批准路径。
gap.zht: 對於不帶無線模組的標準三相感應電動機，不存在 NBTC 無線電批准差距。對於配備無線連接或物聯網功能整合變頻器的電動機，須同時取得 SRRC（中國）和 NBTC（泰國）批准；中國 SRRC 批准不能替代泰國 NBTC 批准。出口商應明確區分電動機認證（TISI TIS 2783）和任何無線組件批准路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Not applicable for standard motors; NBTC radio type approval mandatory if wireless communication module is included
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable for standard motors; SRRC type approval mandatory if wireless module is included

source.publisher: National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission (NBTC), Thailand

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Standard industrial AC motors without wireless modules do not require NBTC radio approval for Thailand market entry. If the motor package includes any integrated wireless communication device, a separate NBTC type approval process must be completed; Chinese SRRC approval is not mutually recognised. Confirm the exact configuration with the Thai importer before shipment. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不带无线模块的标准工业交流电动机进入泰国市场无需 NBTC 无线电批准。如果电动机包含任何集成无线通信设备，则须完成单独的 NBTC 型号批准程序；中国 SRRC 批准不被互认。出货前应与泰国进口商确认确切配置。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不帶無線模組的標準工業交流電動機進入泰國市場無需 NBTC 無線電批准。如果電動機包含任何整合無線通訊設備，則須完成單獨的 NBTC 型號批准程序；中國 SRRC 批准不被互認。出貨前應與泰國進口商確認確切配置。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
